CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIME(0) WITH TIME ZONE, event_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time, event_name) VALUES (1, '12:30:00+01:00', 'Conference');
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time, event_name) VALUES (2, '09:15:00-05:00', 'Meeting');
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time, event_name) VALUES (3, '15:45:00+00:00', 'Webinar');
SELECT event_name, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' FROM events;
SELECT event_id, event_name FROM events WHERE event_time > '10:00:00-05:00';
CREATE TABLE event_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_id INT, log_time TIME(0) WITH TIME ZONE, FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES events(event_id));
INSERT INTO event_logs (log_id, event_id, log_time) VALUES (1, 1, '13:00:00+01:00');
INSERT INTO event_logs (log_id, event_id, log_time) VALUES (2, 2, '10:30:00-05:00');
SELECT e.event_name, el.log_time FROM events e INNER JOIN event_logs el ON e.event_id = el.event_id WHERE el.log_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' > '13:00:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_time BETWEEN '08:00:00-05:00' AND '18:00:00+01:00';
SELECT DISTINCT event_time FROM events ORDER BY event_time;
WITH TimeFilter AS (SELECT event_time FROM events WHERE event_time < '17:00:00+00:00') SELECT AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(event_time)) FROM TimeFilter;
SELECT e.event_name, el.log_time FROM events e LEFT JOIN event_logs el ON e.event_id = el.event_id WHERE el.log_time IS NULL;
SELECT MAX(event_time) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS max_event_time FROM events;
SELECT event_name, event_time FROM events WHERE event_time LIKE '%:00' ORDER BY event_time;
SELECT event_name FROM events WHERE event_time::TIME(0) >= CURRENT_TIME AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';
